openHouses.description: Welcome to this beautifully maintained and thoughtfully updated four-bedroom, three full bathroom home, ideally situated in the sought-after Donald Park section of Hastings-on-Hudson, where the added benefit of no village tax offers significant annual savings. Located just two miles from the Metro-North train station and close to top-rated schools, village shops, parks, and recreation, this home combines comfort, space, and value in one of Westchester's most desirable Rivertown communities.
